author: Tim Hartmann
message:
Merge pull request #62 from timhartmann7/fix/gui-icon-terminal-dashboard

Fix/gui icon terminal dashboard

author: Tim Hartmann
message:
feat(gui): filter dashboard hosts from a slide-out search

A round toggle left of Add host slides a search field out to its left and filters
the card grid live by name, hostname or tag — case-insensitive, mirroring the TUI
host search. Frontend-only, like the snippet search; the core is untouched.

author: Tim Hartmann
message:
fix(gui): align selector titles with the sidebar and clear the footer

Raise the Dashboard/Snippets headings to sit level with the OmnySSH wordmark,
and let the dashboard grid grow (min-h-full) so its bottom padding stays below the
last card instead of overflowing under the status bar.

author: Tim Hartmann
message:
fix(gui): soften the terminal top edge and clear the footer

Trade the fixed title-bar inset for a small top pad plus a blur/fade strip so
scrolled output dissolves into the top edge instead of clipping, and add a bottom
gap so the last line never runs under the status bar.

author: Tim Hartmann
message:
feat(gui): regenerate the app icon from the dark master

Rebuild the platform icon set from icon-dark.svg, placing the mark on the
macOS 824/1024 grid so the dock icon reads at the same size as its neighbours
instead of full-bleed.

author: Tim Hartmann
